ddls:
CREATE TABLE "repositories" (
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the repository */,
  "release" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is a release repository */,
  "snapshot" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is a snapshot repository */,
  "blacklisted" INTEGER /* Whether the repository is blacklisted */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner (user) of the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repositories_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES repository_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the repository type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the repository type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "repository_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each repository version */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_number" TEXT /* Version number */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the version was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_repository_versions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., developer, project manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "read" INTEGER /* Whether the user has read access */,
  "write" INTEGER /* Whether the user has write access */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "release_repositories" (
  "release_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each release repository */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date of the release */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the release was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the release */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("release_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_release_repositories_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snapshot_repositories" (
  "snapshot_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each snapshot repository */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "snapshot_date" TEXT /* Date of the snapshot */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the snapshot was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the snapshot was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the snapshot */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("snapshot_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snapshot_repositories_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "blacklisted_repositories" (
  "blacklist_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each blacklisted repository */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "blacklist_date" TEXT /* Date the repository was blacklisted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the repository was blacklisted */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the blacklisting was last updated */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for blacklisting */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("blacklist_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_blacklisted_repositories_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "repo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the repository */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the repository was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., read, write) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the repository */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user accessing the repository */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_repo_id FOREIGN KEY ("repo_id") REFERENCES repositories ("repo_id")
)
